# In The Zo-ne

The name's Vrijen; you can call me V

Two things you should know:

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Zero-setup ATS for early-stage founders with built-in sourcing from the world's best professional communities

Zo Fanatic

Way too many opinions about productivity and why modern AI tools are failing us

Drowning in deal flow and information

Overwhelmed by meetings and tasks

NYC Superconnector

Struggling to maintain relationships at scale

Data coming at us from all directions, ending up scattered across tools

The more you can do, the more you have to do

Tools make us feel like this should all be easy—it's not

1

2

3

Outdated Model

Built on "capture and store" from when data was scarce and hard to manipulate

Workflow Myopia

Focused on complex individual workflows while ignoring the greater complexity in interconnecting them

Generic Solutions

Built for "everyone" and therefore "not you specially"

01

Holistic approach to your entire workflow ecosystem

02

Natural prompting + socratic dialogue, not rigid templates

03

Works with anything that has API documentation



Intelligent coordination of complex workflows



Custom Personas

Switch between personas for different analysis and outputs



Hyper-Personalized Output

Results tailored specifically to your needs and context



Seamless connection with your existing data structures

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Effortless Capture

Meetings automatically flow into your knowledge system without manual intervention

- Zero-friction recording

- Instant transcription

- Smart categorization

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Pattern Recognition

Identifies recurring themes and topics automatically

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

Content Maps

Surfaces key deliverables promised + context to generate them
